text: The prices were unfairly overly priced and the service is not up to the mark. I really wish there were other competitors to end this monopoly

Very disappointing experience with Urban Company. After my first AC service, the AC started leaking water within days because the outdoor unit wasn't serviced properly, forcing me to pay for another visit. Later, I booked a technician only for a wiring issue as the AC wasn't turning on properly or cooling. Instead, they added an unnecessary AC Service Lite and charged extra despite my AC already being serviced twice. Poor workmanship, unnecessary upselling, and lack of transparency.
They stopped the insta help facility in my area

Your services are horrible particularly the cleaning service. If you can't manage resources don't provide it. Always forcing customer to reschedule or cancel the booking. I won't recommend people to use it.

Don't trust Urban company anymore for insta help. if you have done prior booking for weekend they will cancel it last moment and then no slot will be available for the day. you can't rely on Urban company for instahelp. if you are looking for instahelp try some different apps , never trust Urban company in future

Update : If at all you care to resolve any issue , Give an option to escalate to human customer care in the app . No point in replying here Untrustworthy service . rescheduled booking 2 times and ultimately cancelled from system . no customer care just Useless AI with repeated responses . Also despite me agreeing to the changed time suggested by system Booking cancelled stating no response from me . This is absolute Nonsense . Urban company thinks AI Is more useful than customer satisfaction.
They charged me 200 for the service I didn't even availed. Worst customer centric company
i booked plumber, the plumber came without tools and reschedule, after than he never pick the calls and mark the job as paused. Neither it can be cancelled. worst experience
don't install this app urban app very bed cleaning from this company install authorised company in better cleaning for

Very poor service My booking got rescheduled twice because of very poor and unprofessional reasons. the service professional forgot his machine, other day he was not able to come. never rely on them when you are in need these guys are expert at measing up.

I used to love this app for the beautiful service it used to provide in my area, a few months ago most of the services were available, my family's microwave and washing machine was fixed by these guys, I used to do my yearly laptop maintenance/servicing from here, but all of a sudden most of the service in my area got cut off, It was really convenient before, please bring it back.

Very Bad Service, their professional cheated customers, on booking of instahelp 22 June 26 professional "Komal" who was Unprofessional behaviour cheated me. Company not take any action after complain.

worst attitude by the service executive. i have booked gas stove service and paid online. tried calling executive multiple times and no response. when i tried to cancel the service then got call from same executive with bad attitude.

maine 6188 ka owdr kiya jismain maine 2 Rica roll bhi Dale the jismain ki jb owdr aaya toh 2 Rica roll nhi aaye the maine company main complaint dali toh unone bola ki warehouse se refund cancel ho gya hai agr mere pss Rica roll on ki booking aa gyi toh main kya krungi aise toh koi bhi owdr nhi dalega ap logo pr phle bhi owdr kiya th toh usmain Rica ka box khula hua aaya th fir owdr kiya th toh oil khula hua aaya th ab owdr kiya toh Rica roll hi nhi aaye 2 ab btao main kya kru
totally unreliable! they cancel at the last moment.

worst App , I had booked insta help on this and finished payment. After that all ways the app shows" something went wrong " . I lost my money and time. and no one came at booked timings... don't lose money using this app...

i have been using uc for all my salon needs.. basic service's like waxing and threading were priced fairly...It was ok you removed the classic pocket friendly service but now you have added 129 travel fee ... dude the service providers live in the next building... what is this unnecessary cost you are adding up every month.. I am Booking from Yes Madam because comparatively prices are low and I am very frustrated with all the extra costs... I was a regular customer for more than 2 years now..Bye

Fraud Company There customer care don't even respond. Even after paying the consultation in the right category - it gets booked in some other and no one is taking ownership. Also within fraction of seconds - the price for full bathroom grouting which was priced at 3500 went up to 4500+. If you can't give proper service - then why are you looting people's money.

horrible service ..native has no way of uplifting customers chats for tech support ..we end up paying for warranty plus for booking via app for the same service ..on top of that really incompetent customer service who can't understand simple things and complicate issues and waste time and money
Absent credentials. No contact number or customer care number or return option availability mentioned in the app
Native M1 : Warranty 2 years. I m trying to call a service for this product but help section is not loading any options. How to call them, there is no number also.
I do not recommend Urban Company. I had a very bad experience with their AC service.

2026-July - Try this make 2 bookings 8am n 9am. When maid comes at 8am give her otp.It wont work.9am otp will work for 8am booking. Bad design June - How stupid of them to tell the maid that I gave bad rating , as they cut the commission to her on specific booking and later she comes n fights with me
No dedicated customer care support instead some AI bot to handle complaints/issues.
shame on how you treat your employees. Treat them with respect and transparency.

great experience, professional guy and did a good job. okay the ac service and washing machine repairs is good as long as you keep an eye on the work done. today I had asked for my double door gasket and magnet replacement. Double door means a fridge with two doors a small one for the freezer and a large door for the fridge. the rate card for replacement under the head double door showed price of 1700 and the technical and the customer care insisted that two doors means amount is 3400. cheats
very bad experience AC kharab kar di be faltu ki add dekh kar fsate ho

By design this app is not safe, you book services for female members of your family, and they will assign some random male professional, it almost looks like they intentionally want to promote this filth. This is the platform which is least concerned about women safety. Even decades ago, IRCTC had this common sense how to assign seats when its being booked for a female passenger.

Very disappointing service from Urban Company. I booked a service slot in the morning, but the technician who arrived did not complete the work. Instead, the service was rescheduled, causing unnecessary delay and inconvenience. On top of that, I am now being asked to pay again. This is completely unacceptable. I expected professional and reliable service, but my experience has been a waste of time and money. I hope Urban Company resolves this issue without charging me extra.

There are couple of serious concerns about I want to highlight 1. Booked AC servicing (2ACs) in Ahmedabad one split another window AC, the professional assigned didn't have any idea about the need and denied to serve the window AC - I rescheduled the visit as per his request the another professional assigned, same story no resolution 2. The cost of the servicing was Rs 1099. the refunded amount was Rs. 413, if you are unable to serve why have you deducted the money from the customer?

worst customer service! they reschedule from their side without any consent and then force you to pay cancellation fees. No executive available to connect and explain. Pathetic app and no customer service
worst application. earlier it was good now nearly all the person coming from this try to say some false things and make extra bill. i am unstalling this app

UC is a fraud company and with Instahelp. they found a new way to cheat customers, first they push you to buy packs and then stop serving your request. when you decide to cancel the pack to be able to take the regular service, they charge a hefty cancellation charge , that your entire money is taken away. Right now, they don't have helps available and still trying to prove this ad workable model.

about kitchen cleaning, This is very disappointing. While booking, it appeared that chimney cleaning was included, but later I was informed that it was not. This is misleading and feels like cheating. The booking details are unclear and do not provide proper information about what is actually included. This kind of poor communication leads to unnecessary inconvenience and frustration.

Hello Urban Company Team, My mother is a UC partner in Hyderabad. She completed her work, but her payment of ₹8,000 has not been received. It has been 4 days already. Please check this issue and help us receive the pending payment as soon as possible. Thank you.

Don't book any service from Urban Company. Technician came to my house and threaten to my mother. And steal all money and jewelries. I have tried to call Urban Company emergency number but they didn't not picked my phone. Very bad experience now It is a crime scene. And don't buy UC membership no benefits. it charges extra like service charges and all. Don't use UC app. This is my experience.
ye sirf paise laite h baad main koi service nhi milte book kro paise do uske baad reschedule krte raho aana kiase ko nhi na koi toll free number h jispe baat kr skte h
not able to connect M2 pro
Their insta help keeps getting canceled without prior intimation, no value for time and pre-booking.

Worst for deep cleaning, please never call them for any cleaning activities. I called for bathroom, at first they locked it from inside I thought maybe they just want to clean peacefully but when I knocked and checked then realised that they were doing it very unhygienically and they only care about showing it clean and then spray a freshner to make it smell nice. If I gave you the details then you may want to stop using your bathroom until you get it cleaned again. you may even Puke!
UC insta help in 10min, but no slots are available for two' three days
misleading information in Thai massage there's no oil service why don't you remove all the st images there cheap local customers messing with partnrs
"I want to get a showcase made for my TV setup, but Urban Company says they can't service my location. This is unfair, right? They should provide services to our location as well."

Very disappointing experience with Urban Company. The technician visited, checked the refrigerator, and immediately said the sensor was faulty and advised me to call the Haier service team instead. When the Haier technician came, they found that the sensor was perfectly fine,the actual issue was simply low refrigerant gas. This caused unnecessary confusion, wasted my time, and delayed the repair. Urban Company should ensure their technicians diagnose problems accurately before giving conclusion

horrible service and a completely useless application charging money before inspection of the problem and then again for creating a new problem in it. a completely useless company. please reach out to your local vendors instead of these idiots.
super saver pack is scam. plus the ai help chatbot is unable to resolve queries and also cancels subscription. so now you have to pay extra.

I took painting service. Cost was too high. service is not worth of the cost. Lack of expertise in the field. Don't just rely on their words thinking they are professional and expertise in their field. when it comes to warranty of painting service or dampness of wall warranty is not reliable. it's been more than 6 months they just don't stick to the words of warranty.
this not good yeh achcha nahi kar rahe hai ki Bijnor mai aa gaye dhampur mai aane ke invitation dena hoga kya koi problem hai kya humare city se
worst experience. all time they reschedule booking for maid. only reason is not available.
worst service always late or high price demand by professionals

please don't buy RO . I have moved to my native since 1 month UC is not able to fix the issue. UC doesn't have skilled technicians to fix issues. they visited and created new problems( broke tap my house,RO tap and more ). I have been suffering for a month. I'm begging to take out RO but no action just every day 2 ppl call and say we are working I don't know where they are working . I feel it's a waste of money.
most worst experience ever they did not work they laughed and clicked unnecessary pictures

This company only knows how to exploit hard-working partners. They charge massive commissions and enforce heavy penalties without any proper validation from the partner's side. Your ID can be blocked anytime at the whim of the customer support. They take money from us upfront but provide zero safety or respect to our hard work. Please don't waste your time and money here. Highly disappointed!

Ye bahut hi bekar company hai. Company mein jo baithe hain or rules banate hain unke pas dimag nhi hota hai. Woh bolte kuchh hai aur karte kuchh hai, “Thuk ke chatne” wali baat karte hain. Ye thuk bhi dete hai aur usi ko chaat bhi lete hai.

Their Insta Help is never available and neither are their slots. I spoke to them multiple times but no solution. Their service agents are good provided you are lucky to book a slot. They don't have any slots after 4.00 pm another drawback. Overall, a totally disappointing experience with urban clap.

I have purchased native ro machine on Nov 2025, it is in 2 years warranty. my ro machine is not working properly so I want warranty service from company but the urban company app is not responding with me.
NO human assistance in support. only chatbot, doesn't matter whether your problem is resolved. I could give negative star if I can

They take money for 3 visits for instahelp. No one comes and it is marked completed. When you want to complaint in the app, they just make you type it again and again, with no help. Money goes to waste. pathetic condition

very bad experience of carpenter to install the curtain blinds..while working they broke the strings of curtain n roller too. when i complain within my open window for repairing the carpenter dennied n support team was not at all supportive. They put on me that my curtain string n rolleler were not perfect .. very disappointed.. very unknowlegable person they send n after the mass not ready to accept.
when you have a problem with a professional, u can't connect to customer care they will suggest talking to a robot and they will give you a prototype answer .This app is so bad.

pathetic services I am suggesting everyone who is reading the reviews don't try urban company it's just fraud I had faced a really bad experience with my refrigerator also my aunt please get some technician known to u never from urban company

UC is not refunding the ₹9000/- they charged for PCB repair of my AC which got damaged beyond repair within the warranty. They are not even bothering to respond to my messages on chat. This is a fraud. Need my money back.

This app is pathetic. I booked two massage packs and it was a nightmare to get the second one. They cancelled it twice and still haven't received it. They are now offering me a slot after a week while the new one is available tomorrow.
sometimes nobody is available and sometimes someone is available but that person is not have a good review...that is the issue of this app

it took 3 days , 15 emails , 15 phone calls and 3 times for demo installation to be booked and I had to pay Rs 2000 for Billerica water because of this delay. never will recommend UC to anyone. horrible service. they had damaged my AC also during servicing 6 months back

Very disappointing experience. My washing machine repair booking was canceled multiple times without any proper explanation. It wasted my time and caused a lot of inconvenience. Customer support was not helpful in resolving the issue. I cannot recommend this service until they improve their reliability and customer service.
help section is very poor i want to update my tower number in address but no use reaching out

one of the worst service ever, I was purchased a new ac and I was booked an appointment with Urban company the install my AC on the 4th day of this month now outdoor unit was leaking but after complaining they said installation warrenty only for 10days. they also charge it for approx 1600 plus now they denied for service. I suggest you all never take service from this company .

Great job, UC! Your InstaHelp cancels on me twice. Then you charge me cancellation fees! Plus you don't even refund my money made for an earlier booking. And you have the gall to lower my "rating" as your client when I complain to your chatbot for answers. Keep it up! I suggest to all people to hire Snabbit maids or get a local bai. But never Urban Clap.

UC has turned into a fraud company. I have faced issue on multiple occasions. Their gas refilling in AC doesn't even last 2 months even after their technician fixes all the "leakages" before gas charging. They have reduced warranty period from 3 months to 1 month. They also do not honor their warranty claim on their Native RO by making excuses which are not mentioned anywhere in their terms. Stay away from UC and Native RO. 2Y warranty is a scam. Local technicians are more reliable than UC.

company frauding my refrigerator minimum service charge will be 448 this is the normal small hand work within 10 minutes is charging me that much urban company will be charging platform fee and tax so heavy that technician will be told me and see the all results in app does that 450 amount will be partner getting only Rs 210 all charges directly go to Urban company
Complain Raised 1 month ago. company is just doing Timepass. no Service No Seriousness. app sucks. as it doesn't work on realtime. it never shows error.
it's not available in our area pls be available in our area

Please do not opt for their repair service. Especially AC service. They will do a faulty job and try to extract more money once you start facing problems again. The warranty time is a scam. My AC PCB was changed. After 2 days of repair, my AC stopped working again. This time they claimed motor issues. My AC never had any other issue before this repair.

Very disappointing experience. The electrician sent by the company ended up damaging my ceiling fan. I was assured that I would receive a refund, but despite repeated follow-ups, nothing has been processed. Now, I can't even get in touch with a customer support agent to resolve the issue. Poor service and even worse after-sales support. I would not recommend this service.
worst service they are always late...why we are waiting so much....no proper resolution...no proper customer care service....Always reply with AI messages

Pathetic customer service. They loot you, and u have to keep talking to their BOT, and it will keep repeating the same thing that it doesn't have the data. Then u have to mail them and grab their attention to get it refunded. They will charge you with a cancellation fee when it is been cancelled from their end and also when you cancel it before 12 hours. They just don't want to refund . WASTE OF TIME AND ENERGY.

extremely disappointing experience with instant help. In one day they've cancelled 4 bookings back to back at the last minute and when contacted the customer care there were very lame computerised replies.

Extremely disappointed with the dishonest technician and customer care team. Got a geyser serviced which stopped working within a month. Rebooked the technician, who never arrived and started job without visiting. Highlighted to customer care and sent mail also. But no resolution provided. They only favored their dishonest technician.

pathetic experience and very bad customer service. only bot is available and no customer care. this often happens when you already pay the amount for the service. then they don't give a shot to help you out.

1.I enrolled in a super saver package. Following the initial service, no subsequent appointments were available for the second or third service. Additionally, these packages have a one-month expiration period. We have not been offered any alternative slots or extensions. 2.After pre-booking, appointments are often canceled at the last minute, with the next available slots typically being one or two days later.
bhot expensive hian 459 main kids hair cut hain bass loot hain is app pr I dnt loke it phele price affordable thy pr ab bht jyada hain

Absolute nightmare. Avoid at all costs! The technician took my AC PCBs for repair and completely ghosted. Urban Company has zero control over their workers. Customer support is completely useless—they just gave me a constant runaround, closed my ticket without resolving it, and left me with a completely dismantled AC in peak summer. They essentially let their tech steal my property. Zero ethics, zero accountability. A local technician is 100x more reliable. Disastrous company.

Deceptive bait-and-switch! They lure you with a ₹49 service, but sneakily add a ₹99 visitation fee and platform charges, auto-debiting ₹158 from your wallet without showing a final total screen. If you immediately try to cancel after realizing the trick, they slap you with a ₹100 penalty. Total scam to loot customers. Avoid!

pathetic service and customer service.. warranty given on ac servicing was of 30 days and the issue reoccurred and when I went back to claim my warranty i am shocked to see it's decreased to 10 days and already expired!! taking it to consumer court
app should clearly mention what work can be done inside home and outside home

Worst app I booked an AC ride but I never received a call from the theme They cancelled my booking without informing me and still charged me a 200 cancellation fee. I contacted customer care through messages but I didn't get any response. The driver arrived late and I even waited for him and tried calling, but there was no proper communication. This was a very disappointing experience. Please don't use this urban company
done booking twice both the time they wasted my time at schedule time engineer calls and ask to cancell the booking and u can not even talk to someone pathetic service
Most fraud company ever. Don't trust on urban company. I have tried it twice and both time they charge extra after finished work and also they will ask you to give them good rating.

The AC cleaning technician completed the service and then took my phone and submitted a 5-star rating himself without asking for my permission. This is unprofessional and unethical. Customer ratings should always be given by the customer, not by the service provider. I hope this issue is taken seriously to prevent it from happening to others.
I used this app. their technicians make fool of you and charged hefty & cheated
Their motto is Unprofessional services at outrageous price. Support for Native M1 is really poor.
It was really bad. The technician (Kudelli Janardhan ) was highly unprofessional. uninstalled the app .

thier ac service is very poor. thier technicians forcefully ask for 5 star rating even thier work is very very unsatisfactory. thier technician work for ac servicing and after warter leak he told not to inform UC. some how after fix the issue wrongly my ac started malfunctioning. After that I have to reistall the ac by Connect xpert. Govt should bannd UC.

This is how you lose customers. I booked an electrician through this app for a fridge repair. Tech shows up, does a “search”, tells me he doesn’t have the part and can’t fix it. Fair enough. But then THE APP cancels the booking and charges ME a cancellation fee. So I wasted my time, my fridge is still broken, and I’m out of money because your pro wasn’t equipped. If your technician can’t do the job, why am I getting penalized? Avoid unless you enjoy paying for failures.

Service inspection charges collected from me for laptop are 199/- (with taxes 258/-) given estimation charges 3515/- for bios software upgrade and I found it is exorbitant, on rejecting services they charged me 258/- rupees for doing nothing. Hopeless services rendered by Urban company, and I will never ever recommend to anyone. Simply cheating customers by sending unprofessional service technicians who's moto is to mint money from the opportunity.
very unprofessional app , no one is there to help . Everyone is asking for more money . worst app
the app and the customer care team is pathetic worst app for any service a complete team of unprofessional people

I booked insta help one day before still no one came... this has happened multiple times.. what is the point of taking the booking if you don't have person to work... it's frustrating to book and then wait and later do all work by ourselves...

I had a very disappointing experience with this app. The spare parts are priced significantly higher than their actual market value, and the overall service charges are excessive. It feels like customers are being overcharged under the guise of service and convenience. Transparency in pricing is essential, but this platform fails to provide fair value for money. I expected honest pricing and reliable service, but instead felt exploited. I cannot recommend this app to others.
need to explain issue related to technician how can I contact
staffs of urban is very unprofessional

Very poor service. The professional asked for the OTP, then left without completing the job, saying someone else would come. No one came, yet the job was falsely marked as completed. I still haven't received my ₹161 refund. Customer support was unhelpful and kept insisting the job was completed instead of resolving the issue. Extremely disappointing experience. I won't recommend Urban Company unless they improve service quality and customer support.

Your Executive tried to cheat me, he barely looked at the fridge for 5 minutes and gave a 10000 Rs quote to fix the same. Quoted extremely high prices for compressor repair and gas and other charges. The fridge was under warranty which he never checked. Or even analysed. I got the whole thing repaired in 2500 from godrej. Pathetic service and full waste of consultation services.
worst experience that i got for cleaning washroom ....gave excuses for cleaning and returned back without doing anything....

This app is terrible; the 'Instahelp' feature is particularly bad. They initially told me to buy a three-booking package and use it within a month, but now, whenever I open the app to book, it shows 'not available.' It is a really bad app. I’ve been trying to book for two days with no success. You should definitely think twice—or fifty times—before using this app or making a booking or Instahelp ka matlab तुरंत मदद hota hai ki later.

Very disappointing billing experience. The app shows ₹599 (service) + ₹2,800 (gas) + ₹419 (taxes & fees) = ₹3,818, but the invoice emailed to me has a completely different breakup: ₹819 as UC charges, ₹199 as partner service charges, and ₹2,800 only as a payment receipt instead of a proper tax invoice. On top of that, the "Download Tax Invoice" option in the app doesn't work. Billing should be transparent and consistent across the app and invoices.
very bad experience No time Value i book 28/06 10 AM slot they Auto cancel at 11 am So Don't Book Local Service Is best Thank You

I am dissatisfied with urban company....They have cheated me....2 months back I had filed a complaint regarding my water purifier. Its tap was broken and the engineer had to visit me but he didn't turn up and the company had charged the service fee from me in this current service( hair Straightening)which I had taken from them without my knowledge.So, don't trust this company...It is of no use.. They just make us fool and cheat us...BEWARE OF THEM!!

Terrible experience!! This app consistently fails to deliver. I've spent two months dealing with forced cancellations and constant rescheduling requests to later dates. To make matters worse, there is no way to reach an actual human for help. Completely unprofessional and unreliable—I would not recommend this to anyone.

I had my AC serviced and gas refilled by Urban Company. Initially, everything seemed fine, but after just 35 days, my AC completely stopped cooling. This is extremely disappointing because I paid for professional service expecting a lasting solution. The service quality was poor, and it feels like the issue was not properly diagnosed or fixed. I wasted both my time and money. I would not recommend Urban Company for AC servicing based on my experience. They need to improve their service quality

I had selected bathroom intense cleaning for my 2 bathroom. The cleaning person used excessive acid and left permanent stains, when I complained they arranged a free revisit but the person started sending rude messages which made me uncomfortable to let him back in, when I requested UC to assign a different person they said they couldnt and offered me refund, they give refund without addressing the issue which is not good.
The highest level of unprofessionalism that you can expect from a service company. Broken, unnecessarily complicated processes that add no value.
not able to raise compliant and if somehow contact UB no action taken.
worst experience. hidden charges applied. rate already too high plus hidden charges. app is not user friendly. all in all worst experience.
most reckless , careless people , who are not bothered about commitments

Very disappointing experience. Urban Company shows a low price before booking but charges a much higher amount after the visit. This is misleading and feels like a pricing scam. The final charges were far above the market rate, with no proper justification. This kind of hidden pricing is unfair and destroys customer trust. I will not use Urban Company again and would not recommend it to others. this should not be delivered 1 star .
worst app...customer support ke liye kuch nhi karte...only chat no phn calls

Bewakoof banane wala machnic Mera AC no cooling ki complete ke thee Machnic aaya usne check kiya bola PCB aur fan motor kharab hai low air rahi hai. kul 4800 ka kharcha lagega Maine ₹340 adv me deker usko wapas Kiya Bahar ke dusre mechanic ko dikhaya usne bataya ac choke ho gaya hai usko utaar ke service karni padegi 1200 me uninstall Kiya fir install Ac naya jaisa Fir Ho Gaya badhiya cooling Kar Raha Hai hawa ka flow bhi achcha hai uc company chor company Urban
over cost even installation of Geasure cost around 1500 rupees of simple work

once service booked ,I can't find cancel button in the app. somehow I googled and opened a chat in the app and cancelled with cancellation charge of 20%. I.e 20% of total amount . paid Avance of 1700 , out if which 1600 is cancellation charge. 2. nowhere they mention about this cancellation charges. suppose to be in the booking page. but don't. careful about this unprofessional practice, you will loose money.
Booked service (AC) after grievance twice by your side and again cancelled twice without giving reasons. I feel cheated. I have uninstalled the app. I will be shareing cheating experience.

Worst experience with Insta Help. They tempt customers to book maid services using promotional codes, but then cancel the service just one day before, seemingly because the discounted booking earns them less. Instead, they assign the maid to other customers where they can make more money. This has happened to three times in a row. To make matters worse, there is no reliable way to contact customer support or get the issue resolved. I would not recommend their service. extremely unreliable
day by day worst app... even they don't maintain the proper record of their professionals who has left their company and who has not..

This was my first experience with UC, and it was disappointing. The professional was initially shown to arrive in 8 minutes, but the ETA kept increasing to 19 minutes and beyond. I ended up waiting for almost 2 hours. Despite multiple requests to assign another available professional, no help was provided, and even contacting the assigned professional seemed difficult. In the end, I booked through Snabbit, and their professional arrived on time and saved the situation before my guests arrived.
don't buy Native RO. no after sales service. their AI agent is meant for harassment only.

DONT WASTE YOUR MONEY AND TIME. DONT BOOK INSTA SERVICES AT ALL, ITS FRAUD AND SCAMMING PUBLIC MONEY WITH NO REGUNDS, HOW IS THIS APP 4.7 RATING WHILE MOST OF THE RATINGS ARE 1 AND 2. EITHER PROFESSIONAL DONT SHOWUP OR TOO PRICY FOR ANY JOB. No Proper Customer Support too, just a basic AI Q&A

I wanted to avail urban company service for house clenaing. I had applied for the same through urban company app and pre paid INR 739. The executive arrived and denied to work. The urban compnay help line executive with this regard has cancelled my booking and refunded only INR40. Remaning amount was deducted. I seek the remaining amount as my work was not done. its a scam to gain 700 rs from customer.

Reply to UC's response:- I can't share personal details on a public platform. You're such a big company, you don't have a Privacy Policy in place? Previous Review: This app's not great for saving money on gig work anymore, especially with better options out there. The membership benefits are totally useless. I paid for the annual membership and didn't even get a discount on a plumbing job. They could at least offer free cancellations to members. Seriously, it's pointless.
unable to speak to customer care....AI BOT is totally waste

Every technician that is visiting for AC repair offering private gas refill service and later if problem reoccurs neither technician, nor company takes responsibility. This is really annoying and frustration as in the end, only the consumer will suffer.

RO filter replaced on June 20. It's been 7 days and still no follow-up technician visit. Every day they reschedule. Today the technician confirmed twice and then cancelled last minute. Requested a callback I spoke with team members Riya Yadav, Kunjika Singh, Ishank Tomar, Aaksh Sharma, and Prince — but nothing was resolved despite multiple follow-ups. Zero accountability. Avoid Urban Company if you need any after-service support.
Don't install this app , worst app ever , cash on delivery option not available.
poor communication.. don't get ur appliances repaired from them

they don't inform you that their professional will not arrive at the time they allotted abd when only then tell you that service is not possible that day when you raise a complaint , wasted my evening and now the only slot is on Sunday thus wasting my Sunday too they called me again and are now saying they cant do the Sunday and only slot now available is for next week on a Thursday. their help chat is useless, you can't connect to a human. terrible customer care from them
unprofessional technicians complaints were not rectified at all but charged more than the market price i don't recommend it at all
don't buy this company water purifier its totally weast of money showing TDS very High problem not solve

Very poor experience with UC. I purchased a Native M1 Water Filter, and within a year, the water tap got damaged. I paid ₹316 for a repair request, but even after 10 days, no technician has visited. Please resolve my issue immediately or refund the service charge.

I had booked Urban Company (UrbanClap) AC gas refill service for my AC. They claimed a 90-day warranty, but within just 28 days the same issue came back. When I contacted support, they refused service and said I need to book again and pay again. This is very disappointing. If a warranty is promised, it should be honored properly. The service did not solve the problem permanently and customer support was not helpful. I am not satisfied with the service experience and expect better accountability
